cases.summary: Mine nearby trees to gather logs
contractEvidence: candidate log block is selected from live block search
pathfinder movement does not drift farther from the selected log
Mineflayer dig promise resolves without interruption
log inventory count increases after dig or nearby drop pickup
postconditionEvidence: runtime verifier passed after log inventory reached the target count

readinessItems.detail: collectLogs is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for collectLogs
